# Publication notes

This folder is the clean public package for Alass GUI.

Included:

- `alass_gui.py`
- `README.md`
- `FORUM_POST_EN_HR.txt`
- `run_alass_gui.sh`
- `run_alass_gui.bat`
- `bin/alass` Linux binary

Not included:

- local cache files
- hidden workspace metadata
- Windows `bin/alass.exe`
- `ffmpeg` / `ffprobe`
- personal media/subtitle files

Windows users can download the official `alass.exe` binary from:

https://github.com/kaegi/alass/releases

Place the binary in `bin/` or make it available in `PATH`. If publishing a package with bundled binaries, include the upstream license notices required by those projects.
